rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Educ. Code §37.0051 governs student disciplinary placement for sexual assault. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 37.0051. PLACEMENT OF STUDENTS COMMITTING SEXUAL ASSAULT AGAINST ANOTHER STUDENT.
_note: Rule text is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict exists.
